title: Merry Merry
excerpt: We actually sent out holiday cards for the first time this year. Our mini session with Jenny Q was fantastic. It happened when Jack was just 7 weeks old (half of the age he is today!). It was the perfect…
body: We actually sent out holiday cards for the first time this year. Our mini session with Jenny Q was fantastic. It happened when Jack was just 7 weeks old (half of the age he is today!). It was the perfect amount of time - 20 minutes - as JC isn't too fond of taking photos most of the time. Both the boys did fantastic and it all worked out perfectly. After a quick turnaround with getting the proofs back, I commissioned Jennifer Simmons to do a front and back design. The back of the card used a photo of Jack with room to write our messages. Then I uploaded the design to Persnickety Prints and a few days later got the order of cards and envelopes in the mail. The writing and addressing of the cards took the longest, but it was fun to do after Jack went to bed. Hoping that this will become a tradition for years to come. Thanks for visiting and reading this blog! From our family to yours...
